issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' but requires cost specification. The card text shows '➀' cost (rest 1 DON!!), which must be encoded in the cost field of the effect, not just the trigger.
Missing 'cost' field. Activated abilities require cost specification: cost should include the rest/DON mechanic (Rest this Character + 1 DON).
PlayFromHand action missing 'max' constraint. Card text says 'up to 1', which must be encoded as max:1 in the action.
